en: "For the kingdom of heaven is like a master of a house who went out early in the morning to hire laborers for his vineyard.
zh: “天國好像一個家主，清早出去雇請工人到他的葡萄園工作。

en: After agreeing with the laborers for a denarius a day, he sent them into his vineyard.
zh: 他和工人講定了一天的工錢是一個銀幣，然後派他們到葡萄園去。

en: And going out about the third hour he saw others standing idle in the marketplace,
zh: 大約九點鐘，他又出去，看見還有人閒站在街市上，

en: and to them he said, 'You go into the vineyard too, and whatever is right I will give you.'
zh: 就對他們說：‘你們也到葡萄園來吧，我會給你們合理的工錢。’

en: So they went. Going out again about the sixth hour and the ninth hour, he did the same.
zh: 他們就去了。約在正午和下午三點鐘，他又出去，也是這樣作。

en: And about the eleventh hour he went out and found others standing. And he said to them, 'Why do you stand here idle all day?'
zh: 下午五點鐘左右，他再出去，看見還有人站著，就問他們：‘你們為甚麼整天站在這裡不去作工？’

en: They said to him, 'Because no one has hired us.' He said to them, 'You go into the vineyard too.'
zh: 他們回答：‘沒有人用我們。’他說：‘你們也到葡萄園來吧。’

en: And when evening came, the owner of the vineyard said to his foreman, 'Call the laborers and pay them their wages, beginning with the last, up to the first.'
zh: 到了黃昏，園主對管工說：‘把工人叫來，給他們工錢，從最後的開始，到最先來的。’

en: And when those hired about the eleventh hour came, each of them received a denarius.
zh: 那些下午五點鐘才開始作工的人來了，每個人都領到一個銀幣。

en: Now when those hired first came, they thought they would receive more, but each of them also received a denarius.
zh: 最先作工的人也來了，以為會多得一點，但每個人也是領到一個銀幣。

en: And on receiving it they grumbled at the master of the house,
zh: 他們領到之後，就埋怨家主，說：

en: saying, 'These last worked only one hour, and you have made them equal to us who have borne the burden of the day and the scorching heat.'
zh: ‘我們整天在烈日之下勞苦，這些後來的人只工作了一個小時，你卻給他們跟我們一樣的工錢。’

en: But he replied to one of them, 'Friend, I am doing you no wrong. Did you not agree with me for a denarius?
zh: 家主回答他們當中的一個，說：‘朋友，我並沒有虧待你。你我不是講定了一個銀幣嗎？

en: Take what belongs to you and go. I choose to give to this last worker as I give to you.
zh: 拿你的工錢走吧！我給那後來的和給你的一樣，是我的主意。

en: Am I not allowed to do what I choose with what belongs to me? Or do you begrudge my generosity?'
zh: 難道我不可以照自己的主意用我的財物嗎？還是因為我仁慈你就嫉妒呢？’

en: So the last will be first, and the first last."
zh: 因此，在後的將要在前，在前的將要在後。”

en: And as Jesus was going up to Jerusalem, he took the twelve disciples aside, and on the way he said to them,
zh: 耶穌上耶路撒冷去的時候，把十二門徒帶到一邊，在路上對他們說：

en: "See, we are going up to Jerusalem. And the Son of Man will be delivered over to the chief priests and scribes, and they will condemn him to death
zh: “我們現在上耶路撒冷去，人子要被交給祭司長和經學家，他們要定他死罪，

en: and deliver him over to the Gentiles to be mocked and flogged and crucified, and he will be raised on the third day."
zh: 把他交給外族人凌辱、鞭打，並且釘在十字架上。然而第三天他要復活。”

en: Then the mother of the sons of Zebedee came up to him with her sons, and kneeling before him she asked him for something.
zh: 那時，西庇太的兒子的母親，帶著她的兩個兒子前來見耶穌。她跪在耶穌面前求他。

en: And he said to her, "What do you want?" She said to him, "Say that these two sons of mine are to sit, one at your right hand and one at your left, in your kingdom."
zh: 耶穌問她：“你想要甚麼？”她說：“求你下令，使我這兩個兒子在你的國裡，一個坐在你的右邊，一個坐在你的左邊。”

en: Jesus answered, "You do not know what you are asking. Are you able to drink the cup that I am to drink?" They said to him, "We are able."
zh: 耶穌回答：“你們不知道你們求的是甚麼。我將要喝的杯，你們能喝嗎？”他們說：“能。”

en: He said to them, "You will drink my cup, but to sit at my right hand and at my left is not mine to grant, but it is for those for whom it has been prepared by my Father."
zh: 他對他們說：“我的杯你們固然要喝，只是坐在我的左右，不是我可以賜的；我父預備賜給誰，就賜給誰。”

en: And when the ten heard it, they were indignant at the two brothers.
zh: 其他十個門徒聽見了，就向他們兄弟二人生氣。

en: But Jesus called them to him and said, "You know that the rulers of the Gentiles lord it over them, and their great ones exercise authority over them.
zh: 耶穌把他們叫過來，說：“你們知道各國都有元首統治他們，也有官長管轄他們。

en: It shall not be so among you. But whoever would be great among you must be your servant,
zh: 但你們中間卻不要這樣；誰想在你們中間成為大的，就要作你們的僕役；

en: and whoever would be first among you must be your slave,
zh: 誰想在你們中間為首的，就要作你們的奴僕。

en: even as the Son of Man came not to be served but to serve, and to give his life as a ransom for many."
zh: 正如人子來，不是要受人的服事，而是要服事人，並且要捨命，作許多人的贖價。”

en: And as they went out of Jericho, a great crowd followed him.
zh: 他們從耶利哥出來的時候，有許多人跟著耶穌。

en: And behold, there were two blind men sitting by the roadside, and when they heard that Jesus was passing by, they cried out, "Lord, have mercy on us, Son of David!"
zh: 有兩個瞎眼的人坐在路旁，聽說耶穌經過，就喊叫：“主啊，大衛的子孫，可憐我們吧！”

en: The crowd rebuked them, telling them to be silent, but they cried out all the more, "Lord, have mercy on us, Son of David!"
zh: 群眾責備他們，叫他們不要出聲，他們卻更加放聲喊叫：“主啊，大衛的子孫，可憐我們吧！”

en: And stopping, Jesus called them and said, "What do you want me to do for you?"
zh: 耶穌就站住，叫他們過來，說：“要我為你們作甚麼呢？”

en: They said to him, "Lord, let our eyes be opened."
zh: 他們說：“主啊，求你開我們的眼睛。”

en: And Jesus in pity touched their eyes, and immediately they recovered their sight and followed him.
zh: 耶穌就憐憫他們，摸他們的眼睛。他們立刻能看見，就跟從了耶穌。
